AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-10-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT THE SHEMANO GROUP, INC.'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend to plead the underlying fraud with sufficient specificity and to plead the facts showing the existence of a fiduciary duty. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/CWW/VC)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
